# chord-grid

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Chord-grid input source for Sonata. The grid (e.g. `| C G | Am F |`) authors chord annotations; compile() derives notes from them via the selected voicing strategy.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Source` "Chord Grid"
